squares.notes: First square in the OpenPuff output. Also appears on LP page 16 alongside the text 'AN INSTRUCTION: QUESTION ALL THINGS: DISCOVER TRUTH INSIDE YOURSELF: FOLLOW YOUR TRUTH: IMPOSE NOTHING ON OTHERS. KNOW THIS:'. The Sixth Onion submission form required an order-5 square summing to 3301.
Second square in the OpenPuff output. Only found via steganographic extraction, not on any LP page.

Third square in the OpenPuff output. Also found as out-of-band data between two embedded JPGs in the Apache server-status page of the Third Onion, and on LP page 05 where rune words map to numbers via the Gematria Primus (SHADOWS=341, AETHEREAL=366, BUFFERS=199, VOID=130, CARNAL=320, OBSCURA=245, FORM=91, MOBIUS=226, ANALOG=320, MOURNFUL=199, CABAL=341).
